item.title: Scientists discover the body’s hidden “off switch” for inflammation

item.title: Scientists discover gene that could save bananas from deadly Panama disease

item.title: The nearsightedness explosion may be fueled by dim indoor light, not just screens
item.description: Myopia is skyrocketing around the world, often blamed on endless screen time — but new research suggests the real culprit may be something more subtle...

item.title: Brain development may continue into your 30s, new research shows
item.description: That viral claim that your frontal lobe “isn’t fully developed until 25” turns out to be more myth than milestone. Early brain scans showed that gray ...
